+---------+        +--------------+        +---------+        +---------+        +--------+
|  Entry  +------->|  Loop Start  +------->|  Inner  +------->|  Check  +------->|  Exit  |
+---------+        +--------------+        +---------+        +---------+        +--------+
                           ^                                       :
                           :                                       :
                           +---------------------------------------+
